//: Merge these into package.json scripts. Drop lines for checks the repo doesn't have. 'verify' is the single canonical command CI also runs.

scripts.verify: pnpm check:static && pnpm check:contracts && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:integration && pnpm check:architecture && pnpm check:security
scripts.check:contracts: echo 'spectral lint / buf / asyncapi validate as applicable'
